text: Artificial intelligence is changing our world rapidly, but it also brings important ethical questions. One key issue is bias: if AI learns from data that contains unfair human prejudices, it can repeat or even worsen them. This makes fairness essential—AI systems must treat everyone equally. Another concern is privacy; these systems often collect huge amounts of personal data, which requires careful protection. Transparency is also crucial; people should understand how AI makes decisions, especially in areas like healthcare or hiring. For these reasons, responsible AI development is necessary. Developers must think carefully about these risks, testing systems thoroughly and prioritising human well-being over speed or profit. By doing this, we can create AI that is both powerful and trustworthy.
